title: Sistema Square Water Bottle 1L | BPA Free Water Bottle | Seal Tight Lid | Easy Grip Sides | Assorted Colours
features: Stay hydrated at school, in the office and on the go with this retro-inspired square water bottle
Seal tight screw top lid for transporting with no spills
Concave sides for an easy grip
Designed and made in New Zealand, phthalate and BPA free
description: From the manufacturer A diverse range of drink bottles to suit your hydration needs. Stay hydrated on the go at school, sports and picnics with a range of stylish drink bottles. Sistema Hydrate range has a balance of style and functionality, fashionable colours, sports and kids bottles. Offering a variety of sizes from 330ml/11oz to 1L/33.8oz there is a drink bottle to suit all your family’s hydration needs. A large drink of water first thing in the morning is a great way to welcome the day ahead. Try adding a slice of lemon or lime to your drink for extra flavour. Why You'll Love It Wide Range With a variety of styles and sizes there is a Sistema drink bottle to suit all your family’s hydration needs. Reuse and Reduce Stay hydrated with Sistema's re-usable Hydrate range, reducing landfill from one time use bottles. Dishwasher Safe Sistema Hydrate reusable plastic bottles are dishwasher safe – top rack. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2019L35851/1 & 2019L35852/1 issued in 2019).
